Uses of Class
neqsim.process.diagnostics.Hypothesis

Packages that use Hypothesis
Package
Description
neqsim.process.diagnostics
Equipment-level operational diagnostics and root cause analysis.

    Methods in neqsim.process.diagnostics with parameters of type Hypothesis
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeAcceleration(String param, double[] values, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Detects acceleration (trend getting worse faster) by comparing slopes of the first and second halves of the data.
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeChangePoint(String param, double[] values, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Detects change points by comparing the mean of the first and second halves of the data.
    private List<Hypothesis.Evidence>
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeCorrelations(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Analyzes correlations between parameters.
    private List<Hypothesis.Evidence>
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeMultiParameterPattern(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Analyzes multi-parameter patterns specific to the hypothesis's expected signals.
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeRateOfChange(String param, double[] values, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Analyzes rate of change to detect step changes.
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeThreshold(String param, double[] values, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Analyzes design-limit exceedance.
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.analyzeTrend(String param, double[] values, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Analyzes trend in a time-series.
    private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult
    SimulationVerifier.applyPerturbation(ProcessSystem process, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Applies a perturbation to the cloned process matching the hypothesis.
    List<Hypothesis.Evidence>
    EvidenceCollector.collectEvidence(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Collects hypothesis-specific evidence by analyzing all available data.
    int
    Hypothesis.compareTo(Hypothesis other)
    Compares hypotheses by confidence score (descending).
    private int
    RootCauseReport.countContradictoryEvidence(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Counts contradictory evidence for a hypothesis.
    private Hypothesis.Evidence
    EvidenceCollector.createEvidenceForObservedBehavior(String param, String observation, Hypothesis.EvidenceStrength strength, String source, Hypothesis.ExpectedBehavior observedBehavior, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Converts an observed behavior into evidence for the supplied hypothesis.
    private List<Hypothesis.Evidence>
    EvidenceCollector.crossReferenceStid(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Cross-references STID design conditions.
    private Hypothesis.ExpectedSignal
    EvidenceCollector.findMatchingSignal(Hypothesis hypothesis, String param, Hypothesis.ExpectedBehavior observedBehavior)
    Finds the best expected signal for a parameter and observed behavior.
    void
    HypothesisGenerator.register(String equipmentType, Symptom symptom, Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Registers a custom hypothesis for an equipment type and symptom.
    void
    SimulationVerifier.verify(Hypothesis hypothesis)
    Verifies a hypothesis by simulation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) void
    HypothesisGenerator.adjustPriorsFromOreda(List<Hypothesis> hypotheses, String equipmentType)
    Adjusts hypothesis prior probabilities using OREDA failure-mode data.
    private void
    RootCauseAnalyzer.normalizeConfidenceScores(List<Hypothesis> hypotheses)
    Normalizes confidence scores across all hypotheses using Bayesian posterior normalization.

    RootCauseReport.setHypotheses(List<Hypothesis> hypotheses)
